prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约44925→85142→43114→39605→50521，2022年因试卷难度变化出现异常高位次，近3年（2023-2025）位次在39605–505 21区间波动，2025年基准约50521名，较2024年明显后移约10916名；该校在河南省物理类招生计划2021年55人、2022年56人、2023年52人、2024年45人、2025年 81人、2026年81人，2025年大幅扩招后2026年计划持平，扩招效应已在前一年位次中体现。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 宁夏大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名202 6年约第137名，近年排名在128–170之间波动，整体处于全国中游偏上水平；2022年声誉偏负面（宿舍条件问题），2026年声誉中性/混合（图书馆管理）；抖音 热度排名约第104位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度较低，未出现明显报考热度信号；该校在第五轮学科评估中未进入A-及以上等级，整体学科实力以B类为 主，无顶尖学科支撑，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校物理类招生专业 （电气工程、计算机、软件工程、人工智能等）契合度较好；河南省2026年考生总数约120万人（含不确定），较2025年约90.7万明显增长，竞争加剧；宁夏大 学位于宁夏银川，距河南较远，地域偏好上处于劣势；该校在河南招生人数占其全国总招生比例较低，属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划 持平、河南省考生规模大幅增长以及学校声誉热度一般等因素，预计2026年物理类竞争将进一步加剧，位次在2025年50521名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约51700名，区间5120 0–52200名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 44925 → 85142 → 43114 → 39605 → 50521. In 2022, an abnormal high ranking occurred due to changes in exam difficulty. In the recent three years (2023-2025), rankings fluctuated between 39605 and 50521. The 2025 baseline is approximately 50521, a significant backward shift of about 10916 places compared to 2024. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Henan Province was 55 in 2021, 56 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 45 in 2024, 81 in 2025, and 81 in 2026. After a substantial expansion in 2025, the 2026 plan remains unchanged, and the expansion effect has already been reflected in the previous year's ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 137th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 128 and 170, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. In 2022, its reputation was somewhat negative (dormitory conditions), while in 2026, it is neutral/mixed (library management). Its Douyin popularity ranking is approximately 104th, with a rating of 'average,' indicating low exposure on short video platforms and no significant application heat signal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university did not achieve A- or above grades, with overall discipline strength mainly at the B level and no top-tier disciplines, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication continue to have high social popularity, aligning well with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc.). In 2026, the total number of candidates in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million (including uncertainties), a significant increase from about 907,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, far from Henan, putting it at a geographical disadvantage. The number of students it enrolls in Henan accounts for a low proportion of its total national enrollment, making it a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in 2025 rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the substantial growth in the number of candidates in Henan Province, and the university's average reputation and popularity, competition in the Physics Category is expected to intensify further in 2026, with rankings continuing to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 50521. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 51700, with a range of 51200 to 52200.

Popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science are highly competitive, and candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range are advised to prioritize them.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 5874 → 6352 → 6256 → 5879 → 9488. From 2021 to 2024, they were basically stable in the 5874–6352 range. In 2025, due to the change in exam format to history category, the ranking significantly shifted backward to 9,488, moving back about 3,609 places compared to 2024. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province was 20 students in 2021, 16 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 20 in 2025, and 20 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science ranking is approximately 137th, with a stable or slightly rising trend in recent years. The school level has a certain appeal to liberal arts candidates. In 2022, the reputation was somewhat negative (dormitory conditions), while in 2026, the reputation is neutral/mixed. Douyin popularity is average, with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no A- or above disciplines, and its liberal arts disciplines are relatively weak, with limited appeal to high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, Law, and Ideological and Political Education are socially popular, while teacher-training majors are experiencing differentiation and wait-and-see attitudes. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Henan Province is about 1.2 million, a significant increase from 2025, and the scale of history category candidates is expected to expand accordingly. Ningxia University is located in the northwest region, which has weaker regional preference for Henan candidates. The university's enrollment in Henan history category is small (20 students), with a stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the growth in the number of candidates in Henan Province, and the university's generally average liberal arts strength, it is expected that the 2026 history category ranking will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 9,488. The predicted minimum ranking is about 9,700, with a range of 9,200–10,200.
